detail.description: Jackson Holliday singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Dylan Beavers scores. Blaze Alexander to 3rd.

Jackson Holliday singles on a line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Jackson Holliday hits a grand slam (3) to right center field. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso scores. Leody Taveras scores.
Jackson Holliday singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Alex Hoppe. Coby Mayo to 2nd.
Jackson Holliday singles on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Leody Taveras scores.
Jackson Holliday homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Jackson Holliday singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.

Jackson Holliday singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins.

Jackson Holliday doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Nathan Lukes.
Jackson Holliday hits a ground-rule double (2) on a fly ball down the left-field line.
Jackson Holliday homers (4) on a line drive to center field.
Jackson Holliday singles on a ground ball to center fielder Lucas Spence. Colton Cowser to 3rd.
